lockedMessage: Trip Memory is part of Explorer (Plus). Upgrade to create a shareable memory when you finish a trip.
createToggle: Create a memory of this trip
hotelNamesPlaceholder: Add hotel names, one per line
notFound: No memory saved for this trip.
upgradeShareJournal: Upgrade to Explorer to share your memory card and keep a journal.
entryPlaceholder: Write a moment from your trip…
communitySectionSubtitle: Publish this completed trip to the Community feed. Add a tip and tags so others can discover your route.
communityTipPlaceholder: What should the next traveler know?
communitySectionSubtitleUpdate: Edit your tip, tags, or travel style, then tap Update Community. Your feed listing will match this trip’s itinerary and cover photo.
communityUpdatedBody: Your route on the Community tab now reflects your changes.
communityTipRequired: Add a short tip before publishing.
communityPlacesRequired: Add at least one place to your itinerary before publishing.
communityPublishedBody: Your trip is now on the Community feed.
communityPublishError: Could not publish. Please try again.
communityPublishedBadgeBody: Travelers can discover this route in the Community tab.
